title: BetterDupe
description:
BetterDupe Plugin:
BetterDupe is a versatile item duplication plugin for Minecraft servers, featuring customizable cool-downs and powerful item blacklisting to enhance game-play balance, including Shulker and Bundle checks!
body:
BetterDupe Plugin:
BetterDupe is a versatile item duplication plugin for Minecraft servers, featuring customizable cool-downs and powerful item blacklisting to enhance game-play balance, including Shulker and Bundle checks! [More Information](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/betterdupe.118681/).

Key Features:

    Item Duplication:
        Duplicate items held in the player's main hand using the /dupe command.
        Configurable cooldown to prevent overuse.
    Cooldown Management:
        Apply cooldowns to the /dupe command with customizable duration.
        Prevent spamming of the duplication command.
    Blacklist Settings:
        Blacklist specific items from being duplicated.
        Blacklist items based on their lore to prevent duplication of special items. This is very useful for lifesteal dupe servers!
    Command Permission:
        Control access to the duplication command with permissions.


Commands and Permissions:

    /dupe
        Description: Duplicate the item currently held in the player's main hand.
        Usage: /dupe
        Permission: betterdupe.dupe
        Permission Message: You do not have permission to use this command.


Permissions:

    betterdupe.dupe
        Description: Allows the user to duplicate items with the /dupe command.
        Default: Everyone Can Use


Configuration:
The configuration is easy to customize. You can set cooldowns, blacklist items, and configure messages as needed.
%player% will be replaced with the player's name who executed the command.
%item% will be replaced with the item name being duplicated.
%amount% will be replaced with the amount of items duplicated.

If you need help, refer to the plugin documentation or community support. Our discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/taqmXUVC2t). More updates coming soon!
